'''鈭歯g-v-t''' ('''kangavat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knabble|knabble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-v-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knabble|knabble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-v-t
|-
! Lemma
| kangavat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingavat|thingavat]] || [[word:jingavat|jingavat]] || [[word:shingavat|shingavat]] || [[word:kingavat|kingavat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungavat|thuthungavat]] || [[word:jujungavat|jujungavat]] || [[word:shushungavat|shushungavat]] || [[word:kukungavat|kukungavat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungavat|thungavat]] || [[word:jungavat|jungavat]] || [[word:shungavat|shungavat]] || [[word:kungavat|kungavat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungavat|thungavat]] || [[word:jungavat|jungavat]] || [[word:shungavat|shungavat]] || [[word:kungavat|kungavat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengavat|thengavat]] || [[word:jengavat|jengavat]] || [[word:shengavat|shengavat]] || [[word:kengavat|kengavat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongavat|thothongavat]] || [[word:jojongavat|jojongavat]] || [[word:shoshongavat|shoshongavat]] || [[word:kokongavat|kokongavat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongavat|thongavat]] || [[word:jongavat|jongavat]] || [[word:shongavat|shongavat]] || [[word:kongavat|kongavat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongavat|thongavat]] || [[word:jongavat|jongavat]] || [[word:shongavat|shongavat]] || [[word:kongavat|kongavat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngavat|th忙ngavat]] || [[word:j忙ngavat|j忙ngavat]] || [[word:sh忙ngavat|sh忙ngavat]] || [[word:k忙ngavat|k忙ngavat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangavat|thathangavat]] || [[word:jajangavat|jajangavat]] || [[word:shashangavat|shashangavat]] || [[word:kakangavat|kakangavat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangavat|thangavat]] || [[word:jangavat|jangavat]] || [[word:shangavat|shangavat]] || [[word:kangavat|kangavat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangavat|thangavat]] || [[word:jangavat|jangavat]] || [[word:shangavat|shangavat]] || [[word:kangavat|kangavat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangavat|shangavat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangavat|goshangavat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangavat|gokishangavat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangavatn眉|shangavatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangavatnkn眉|goshangavatnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavatn眉|gokishangavatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangavatsh毛|shangavatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangavatnksh毛|goshangavatnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangavatsh毛|gokishangavatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavatro|shangavatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavatnkro|goshangavatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavatro|gokishangavatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavatmu|shangavatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavatnkmu|goshangavatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavatmu|gokishangavatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangavatsher|shangavatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangavatnksher|goshangavatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangavatsher|gokishangavatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangavatng|shangavatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangavatnkng|goshangavatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangavatng|gokishangavatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangavatya|shangavatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangavatnkya|goshangavatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangavatya|gokishangavatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangavatyam|shangavatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangavatnkyam|goshangavatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangavatyam|gokishangavatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangavatn眉sh毛|shangavatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangavatnkn眉sh毛|goshangavatnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangavatn眉sh毛|gokishangavatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavatn眉ro|shangavatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavatnkn眉ro|goshangavatnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavatn眉ro|gokishangavatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavatn眉mu|shangavatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavatnkn眉mu|goshangavatnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavatn眉mu|gokishangavatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangavatsh毛n眉|shangavatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangavatnksh毛n眉|goshangavatnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavatsh毛n眉|gokishangavatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavatsh毛ro|shangavatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavatnksh毛ro|goshangavatnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavatsh毛ro|gokishangavatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavatsh毛mu|shangavatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavatnksh毛mu|goshangavatnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavatsh毛mu|gokishangavatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangavatron眉|shangavatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangavatnkron眉|goshangavatnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavatron眉|gokishangavatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangavatrosh毛|shangavatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangavatnkrosh毛|goshangavatnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangavatrosh毛|gokishangavatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavatromu|shangavatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavatnkromu|goshangavatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavatromu|gokishangavatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangavatmun眉|shangavatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangavatnkmun眉|goshangavatnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavatmun眉|gokishangavatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangavatmush毛|shangavatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangavatnkmush毛|goshangavatnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangavatmush毛|gokishangavatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavatmuro|shangavatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavatnkmuro|goshangavatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavatmuro|gokishangavatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
